heading: Transferred
label: 61k Transferred
notes: CodificationSection 61k was editorially reclassified as .section 6113 of this title

Prior ProvisionsA prior section 61k, , , , authorized President pro tempore of Senate to appoint and fix compensation of an Administrative Assistant, a Legislative Assistant, and an Executive Secretary. These positions were abolished effective , by .Pub. L. 95–26, title I91 Stat. 79section 101 of Pub. L. 96–38May 4, 1977Oct. 1, 1979
